summary: Spawned from MPI-187 live r580-floor crash. Our Pod create sends no allowedCudaVersions -> driver-roulette placement (host driver too old for the image's CUDA build -> ComfyUI boot crash). Thread allowedCudaVersions through _createPodInternal + createPod (REST) + createPodGraphql, mirroring the minMemoryInGb plumbing (MPI-160). Value derived per-card from the image CUDA-floor profile (MPI-70). Immediate guard for cu128 image; HARD PREREQ before any cu130 image ships.
